title: Pohoda festival!!!!!
text: **Grace’s corner** I had such a good time at Pohoda music festival - I think I was long overdue for a good dance. My favourite acts were a Slovakian rapper, Gleb (or Big Boy Gleb), and a 51 year old Czech DJ, Ventolin. We were insanely tired, as the sun rises at 4.30AM and the tents became saunas by 8.30AM, but still had so much fun. Every Slovakian person was also bloody lovely to us!!
